summary: Off-repo $0 measurement kit assembled and synthetic-dry-run verified. User can begin 7-day Boly pilot after two ~5-min user actions (LabRecorder install + GazeCloudAPI signup). All 5 raw#71 falsifiers preregistered. Phase 3 preflight: 3 PASS / 1 UNVERIFIED (GazeCloudAPI signup, by design) / 0 FAIL.
honest_c3: Necker cube substituted for Boly's bistable plaid; quantitative decoder accuracy not directly comparable to Boly 88%
Webcam OKN budgeted 5-13 pp below research-grade per fallback verdict
GazeCloudAPI is closed-source; reproducibility risk for external groups
Synthetic generator is idealized OKN; real-data PASS not guaranteed by synthetic PASS
No hardware tested by this agent; verification limited to wheel + dylib architecture
escalation_if_fail_n1: Pupil Core purchase $2-3k USD (per fallback verdict section 7)
OR redesign protocol (overt-report only, no covert-OKN)
